wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team |neworg=Topsports Gaming |name= DAN Gaming |orgcountry= China |country= China |region=CN |image=DAN_Gaminglogo_square.png |analysts= |coaches= |manager= Guo "'''Hao'''" Hao |captain= |website= |youtube= |facebook= |twitter= |sponsor= |weibo=http://www.weibo.com/2144gaming?is_all=1 |created= 2016-12 |disbanded= |trades= |rosterphoto= }}{{TOCRWI}} '''DAN Gaming''' was a League of Legends team under [[2144 Gaming]]. They were formerly known as [[2144 Danmu Gaming]]. == History == '''DAN Gaming''' is a Chinese League of Legends team that joined the [[LPL/2017 Season/Summer Season|LPL]] via the [[LPL/2017 Season/Summer Promotion|2017 Summer Promotion]]. Their first season in the LPL didn't go so well as they finished 6th place in their group with 4 wins and 12 losses. They also participated in the [[Demacia Cup/2017 Season|2017 Demacia Cup]] but finished 13th-20th after an 0-2 loss to [[LGD Gaming]]. == Timeline == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} == Player League Participation == {{TeamPlayerLeagueHistory}} ==Organization== ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|staff=yes|newteam=yes}} {{listplayer|Hao (Guo Hao)|cn|Guo Hao (郭皓)|'''Manager'''|newteam=TOP}} {{listplayersp|Buz|cn|Cui Qing (崔清)|'''Leader'''|newteam=TOP}} {{listplayer|BSYY|cn|Luo Sheng (罗盛)|'''Head Coach'''|newteam=FPX}} {{listplayersp||cn|Yang Peng-Fei|'''Manager'''|newteam=none}} {{listplayer/End}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== == Images == File:DAN Gaming logo -2017.png|DAN Gaming's Logo (2016 - 2017) ==See Also== ==External Links== ==References==
